title: Degradation per tyre-age exposure
summary: Normalize `Cumulative_Degradation` by tyre age and expected compound life to separate accumulated wear from stint length.
rationale: Degradation-derived features were present in most stronger stacks. Per-age degradation can reveal unusual tyre stress that raw cumulative degradation does not capture.
implementation_hint: Add degradation per `TyreLife`, degradation per expected compound life, absolute degradation, positive degradation pressure, and degradation-to-finish pressure interactions. Guard zero tyre life with a small denominator.
expected_effect: Small to medium ROC AUC gain with medium-high confidence.
risk: Noisy degradation at low tyre ages can create extreme ratios; clip or winsorize derived ratios.
